description.ko: 물질과 허무의 경계가 영원한 보랏빛 파도로 용해되는 우주의 가장 먼 곳으로의 하강.
description.en: A descent into the furthest reaches of the universe where the boundary between matter and nothingness dissolves into an eternal violet tide.

prompt: Ultra-detailed cinematic shot of the VOID-3 vessel navigating through a dense, ink-black cosmic abyss, glowing dark violet and teal nebulas in the background, bioluminescent star dust swirling in the vacuum, surreal light refraction, high contrast, 8k resolution, photorealistic, sci-fi concept art.
